meta.title: Egypt's Copts During the Current Period of Political Transit
meta.description: A discussion with His Grace Bishop Angaelos, General Bishop of the Coptic Orthodox Church in the United Kingdom - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
